items.name: APOLLO BOWL
items.description: For a limited time, get an Apollo Bowl for only $9.99 enough to fuel your day! Choose from souvlaki, gyro, or falafel.

items.name: bottled pop
items.description: Want a drink? add a bottled pop for only $1.49 when purchased with your bowl.

items.name: SOUVLAKI
items.description: Choice of one or two souvlaki skewers (Chicken, Spicy Chicken or Pork) served with rice, roasted potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: GYRO
items.description: Shavings of roasted beef and lamb served with rice, potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: CALAMARI
items.description: Seasoned, lightly dusted fried calamari served with rice, potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: CHICKEN LEG
items.description: Oven-roasted herbed chicken leg served with rice, potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: LAMB SHANK
items.description: Slow-braised lamb shank in a vegetable ragu served with rice, potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: SPANAKOPITA
items.description: Traditional spinach and feta phyllo pie served with rice, potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: FALAFEL
items.description: Crispy ground chickpeas, herbs and spices served with rice, potatoes, side Greek salad, dip

items.name: GREEK
items.description: Iceberg mix, black olive, cucumber, feta, onion, tomato, MR.SOUVLAKI dressing, pita wedge

items.name: ZEUS
items.description: Kale, spinach, black olive, broccoli, chickpea, cucumber, red cabbage, shredded carrot, tomato, red pepper hummus, Greek feta vinaigrette, pita wedge

items.name: CLASSIC
items.description: Signature 7 inch pita with lettuce, onion, tomato, choice of dip, side and bottled pop.

items.name: LOADED
items.description: Large 9 inch pita loaded with fries, lettuce, onion, tomato, choice of dip, side and bottled pop.

items.name: FETA FRIES
items.description: Our signature fries, topped with feta, served with tzatziki

items.name: GYRO FRIES
items.description: Our signature fries, topped with feta and gyro shavings, served with tzatziki
